dataset: LIDC-IDRI (Lung Image Database Consortium and Infectious Disease Research Institute)

pi_items.metadata_value: LIDC-IDRI from The Cancer Imaging Archive
pi_items.verified_value: LIDC-IDRI from The Cancer Imaging Archive

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes CT scan data from the LIDC-IDRI dataset (case LIDC-IDRI-0001) from The Cancer Imaging Archive. Clinical reference standards for the main pulmonary artery diameter on CT define the normal range as approximately 19.5 mm to 29 mm, with 29 mm being the established threshold for enlargement. Typical valid measurements for non-aneurysmal arteries range from 14.9 mm to 45 mm.
